children.heading: Artificial intelligence
children.label: 1 Artificial intelligence
children.text: The term “artificial intelligence” or “AI” has the meaning given such term in .section 9401 of title 15

children.heading: Awardee
children.label: 2 Awardee
children.text: The term “awardee” means the legal entity to which Federal assistance is awarded and that is accountable to the Federal Government for the use of the funds provided.

children.heading: Award personnel
children.label: 3 Award personnel
children.text: The term “award personnel” means principal investigators and co-principal investigators, faculty, postdoctoral researchers, and other employees supported by a grant, cooperative agreement, or contract under Federal law.

children.heading: Biomanufacturing
children.label: 4 Biomanufacturing
children.text: The term “biomanufacturing” means the utilization of biological systems to develop new and advance existing products, tools, and processes at commercial scale.

children.heading: Emerging research institution
children.label: 5 Emerging research institution
children.text: The term “emerging research institution” means an institution of higher education with an established undergraduate or graduate program that has less than $50,000,000 in Federal research expenditures.

children.heading: Engineering biology
children.label: 6 Engineering biology
children.text: The term “engineering biology” means the application of engineering design principles and practices to biological systems, including molecular and cellular systems, to advance fundamental understanding of complex natural systems and to enable novel or optimize functions and capabilities.

children.heading: EPSCoR
children.label: 7 EPSCoR
children.text: The term “EPSCoR” has the meaning given the term in section 502 of the America COMPETES Reauthorization Act of 2010 ( note).42 U.S.C. 1862p

children.heading: EPSCoR institution
children.label: 8 EPSCoR institution
children.text: The term “EPSCoR institution” means an institution of higher education, nonprofit organization, or other institution located in a jurisdiction eligible to participate in the program under .section 1862g of this title

children.heading: Federal laboratory
children.label: 9 Federal laboratory
children.text: The term “Federal laboratory” has the meaning given such term in .section 3703 of title 15

children.heading: Federal research agency
children.label: 10 Federal research agency
children.text: The term “Federal research agency” means any Federal agency with an annual extramural research expenditure of over $100,000,000 in fiscal year 2022 constant dollars.

children.heading: Foundation
children.label: 11 Foundation
children.text: The term “Foundation” means the National Science Foundation.

children.heading: Historically Black college and university
children.label: 12 Historically Black college and university
children.text: The term “historically Black college and university” has the meaning given the term “part B institution” in .section 1061 of title 20

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 13 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given the term in .section 1001(a) of title 20

children.heading: Interagency working group on inclusion in STEM
children.label: 14 Interagency working group on inclusion in STEM
children.text: The term “interagency working group on inclusion in STEM” means the interagency working group established by .section 6626 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: any organization composed of labor organizations, such as a labor union federation or a State or municipal labor body; and

children.label: i
children.text: individuals employed by the United States, any wholly owned Government corporation, any Federal Reserve Bank, or any State or political subdivision thereof;

children.label: ii
children.text: individuals employed by persons subject to the Railway Labor Act ( et seq.); or45 U.S.C. 151

children.label: iii
children.text: individuals employed as agricultural laborers.

children.heading: Low-income individual
children.label: 16 Low-income individual
children.text: The term “low-income individual” means an individual from a family whose taxable income for the preceding year did not exceed 150 percent of an amount equal to the poverty level determined by using criteria of poverty established by the Bureau of the Census.

children.heading: Manufacturing extension center
children.label: 17 Manufacturing extension center
children.text: The term “manufacturing extension center” has the meaning given the term “Center” in .section 278k(a) of title 15

children.heading: Manufacturing USA institute
children.label: 18 Manufacturing USA institute
children.text: The term “Manufacturing USA institute” means a Manufacturing USA institute described in .section 278s(d) of title 15

children.heading: Minority-serving institution
children.label: 19 Minority-serving institution
children.text: The term “minority-serving institution” means a Hispanic-serving institution as defined in ; an Alaska Native-serving institution or Native Hawaiian-serving institution as defined in ; or a Predominantly Black institution, Asian American and Native American Pacific Islander-serving institution, or Native American-serving nontribal institution as defined in .section 1101a(a) of title 20section 1059d(b) of title 20section 1067q(c) of title 20

children.heading: National Academies
children.label: 20 National Academies
children.text: The term “National Academies” means the National Academies of Sciences, Engineering, and Medicine.

children.heading: Non-profit organization
children.label: 21 Non-profit organization
children.text: The term “non-profit organization” means an organization which is described in and exempt from tax under section 501(a) of such title.section 501(c)(3) of title 26

children.heading: PreK–12
children.label: 22 PreK–12
children.text: The term “PreK–12” means pre-kindergarten through grade 12.

children.heading: Quantum information science
children.label: 23 Quantum information science
children.text: The term “quantum information science” has the meaning given such term in .section 8801 of title 15

children.heading: Recipient
children.label: 24 Recipient
children.text: The term “recipient” means an entity, usually a non-Federal entity, that receives a Federal award directly from a Federal research agency. The term “recipient” does not include entities that receive subawards or individuals that are the beneficiaries of the award.

children.heading: Research and development award
children.label: 25 Research and development award
children.text: The term “research and development award” means support provided to an individual or entity by a Federal research agency to carry out research and development activities, which may include support in the form of a grant, contract, cooperative agreement, or other such transaction. The term does not include a grant, contract, agreement or other transaction for the procurement of goods or services to meet the administrative needs of a Federal research agency.

children.heading: Skilled technical work
children.label: 26 Skilled technical work
children.text: The term “skilled technical work” means an occupation that requires a high level of knowledge in a technical domain and does not require a bachelor’s degree for entry.

children.heading: STEM
children.label: 27 STEM
children.text: The term “STEM” means science, technology, engineering, and mathematics, including computer science.

children.heading: STEM education
children.label: 28 STEM education
children.text: The term “STEM education” has the meaning given the term in section 2 of the STEM Education Act of 2015 ( note).42 U.S.C. 6621

children.heading: Technical standard
children.label: 29 Technical standard
children.text: The term “technical standard” has the meaning given such term in section 12(d)(5) of the National Technology Transfer and Advancement Act of 1995 ( note).15 U.S.C. 272

children.heading: Tribal College or University
children.label: 30 Tribal College or University
children.text: The term “Tribal College or University” has the meaning given such term in .section 1059c of title 20
